401.description: You are not allowed to delete data from an application you do not owe.

404.description: The application you have entered does not exist

500.description: While trying to connect to the database an error occurred.

parameters.name: X-Auth-token
parameters.description: The token that you have acquired either from the DFF Web App or the DFF login api.

parameters.name: inputType
parameters.description: The application (equivalent to type in DFF) that you want to delete data from, e.g. XBELLO.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The id of the specific entity -belonging to this specific application- whose data you want to delete.

404.description: The application you have entered does not exist

parameters.name: X-Auth-token
parameters.description: The token that you have acquired either from the DFF Web App or the DFF login api.

parameters.name: inputType
parameters.description: The application (equivalent to type in DFF) that you want to get data from, e.g. XBELLO.

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The id of the specific entity -belonging to this specific application- that you want to retrieve data from.

parameters.name: lastN
parameters.description: The number of last data entries that you wish to retrieve.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The date after which you want to receive data for the specified application. It may be either date or datetime or datetime with timezone in the ISO-8601 format (e.g., 2022-05-31T06:57:00+0000). The default timezone is UTC.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The date until which you want to receive data for the specified application. It may be either date or datetime or datetime with timezone in the ISO-8601 format (e.g., 2022-05-31T06:57:00+0000). The default timezone is UTC.

500.description: While trying to connect to the database an error occurred.

parameters.name: X-Auth-token
parameters.description: The token that you have acquired either from the DFF Web App or the DFF login api.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username of your Keycloak user.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The password of your Keycloak user.

401.description: Either the requested entity does not exist or you are not authorized to delete it.

403.description: You are not registered in the database: you need to login through the DFF Web App first.

404.description: The domain name that your app uses for subscriptions is not set: you need to set it through the DFF Web App before attempting this request.

500.description: While trying to connect to the database an error occurred.

parameters.name: X-Auth-token
parameters.description: The token that you have acquired either from the DFF Web App or the DFF login api.

parameters.name: subId
parameters.description: The ObjectId of the subscription that you wish to delete.

204.description: Either you do not owe any subscriptions or you mistyped the domain_name that your application uses for subscriptions when you registered your app.

400.description: This method does not accept any parameters.

403.description: Either your domain name is not registered in the DFF Web App or there are not any subscriptions created for your domain name.

404.description: The domain name that your app uses for subscriptions is not set: you need to set it through the DFF Web App before attempting this request.

500.description: While trying to connect to the database an error occurred.

parameters.name: X-Auth-token
parameters.description: The token that you have acquired either from the DFF Web App or the DFF login api.

parameters.name: X-Auth-token
parameters.description: The token that you have acquired either from the DFF Web App or the DFF login api.

info.title: DFF REST APIs
info.description: These are the DFF REST APIs to login and manage data & subscriptions.

ParseError.description: When a mask can't be parsed

MaskError.description: When any error occurs on mask
